testcase.name: stepVerifier_fluxInterval_simula3Eventos
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Estremote\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.10\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.10.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: criar_deveRetornarProdutoCriadoComStatus201
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-12T18:04:29.831-03:00 WARN 11972 --- [ecommerce-webflux] [ parallel-10] io.r2dbc.h2.H2Connection : Option{name='readOnly', sensitive=false} + isn't supported in H2 at the transaction level. You must set it on conenction URL. See http://www.h2database.com/html/features.html#read_only 2026-06-12T18:04:29.834-03:00 INFO 11972 --- [ecommerce-webflux] [ parallel-10] c.e.w.a.usecase.ProdutoService : Produto criado: id=11 nome=Produto Novo

testcase.name: stepVerifier_buscarComFallback_retornaFallback
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-12T18:04:30.209-03:00 WARN 11972 --- [ecommerce-webflux] [ parallel-2] c.e.w.a.usecase.ProdutoService : Produto 999999 não encontrado após retries. Usando fallback.

testcase.name: buscarPorId_naoEncontrado_deveRetornar404
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-12T18:04:30.220-03:00 ERROR 11972 --- [ecommerce-webflux] [ parallel-4] c.e.w.p.h.GlobalErrorWebExceptionHandler : [ERROR] GET /api/v1/produtos/999999 – RuntimeException: Produto não encontrado: 999999
